description: MCP server for the Émile wine cellar — list, add, recommend, scan and search 100k+ wines.
name: io.github.SebastienGal/emile-wine

environmentVariables.description: API key generated from the Émile iOS app (Profile → Settings → API Keys). Starts with `emile_live_...`.
environmentVariables.name: EMILE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the backend URL — only useful for local development against a self-hosted backend.
environmentVariables.name: EMILE_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Logging verbosity. One of: debug, info, warn, error.
environmentVariables.name: EMILE_LOG_LEVEL

title: Émile
